title: Lab 1: LED Test
desc: Build a simple LED circuit and prove the hardware works

title: Lab 2: LED Control
desc: Control an LED from the MicroPython console using GPIO

title: Lab 3: LED Flashing
desc: Write a program that flashes an LED using while True and time.sleep

title: Lab 4: Switch Input
desc: Read a push button from the console and understand pull-up resistors

title: Lab 5: Switch and LED
desc: Write a program that lights an LED when a button is pressed

title: Getting Started
desc: Install MicroPython and the CLB framework, then run a test program

title: Button Light
desc: Light up a NeoPixel strip when a button is pressed

title: Encoder Brightness
desc: Use a rotary encoder to control NeoPixel brightness
